title: trace-topology annotation
description: Ground truth annotation for a reasoning transcript. Created by hand during review. Used as golden test fixtures for parser, graph builder, and analyzer validation.

transcript_file.description: Filename of the .txt transcript this annotates.

notes.description: Free-form notes about the transcript's overall structure.

steps.description: The reasoning trace segmented into logical steps. Each step is a node in the graph.

start_char.description: Character offset where this step begins in the transcript.

end_char.description: Character offset where this step ends.

summary.description: One-line summary of what this step claims or does.

step_type.description: What kind of reasoning move this step makes.

bonds.description: Directed edges between steps. Each bond connects a source step to a target step.

type.description: Bond type per the molecular framework. covalent=logical dependency, hydrogen=self-reflection/correction, vanderwaals=loose association.

confidence.description: Annotator's confidence that this bond exists and is correctly typed.

findings.description: Structural problems identified by the annotator. Ground truth for the analyzer.

steps_involved.description: Step IDs involved in this finding.

description.description: Human explanation of the structural problem.

severity.description: How much this problem undermines the reasoning.
